name: neurologistai
description: Vercel-ready neuroimaging decision-support app with local Slicer integration.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static app with Vercel serverless APIs: no build step needed')"
scripts.check: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/app-skills.js && node --check api/chat.js && node --check api/knowledge.js && node --check api/web-check.js
